case_title: DAVIN JAMESON ERGUN VS. NATHANIAL SPIVEY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $80.00) SERVED DEC-27-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SPIVEY, NATHANIAL
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $735.97 FILED BY ERGUN, DAVIN JAMESON AS TO DEFENDANT SPIVEY, NATHANIAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-24-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-24-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF DAVIN JAMESON ERGUN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NATHANIAL SPIVEY IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS FILED UNTIMELY. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENTANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ERGUN, DAVIN JAMESON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPIVEY, NATHANIAL $735.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $845.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
